title: Cordum Gateway Error Envelope
description: The canonical shape of every error response body returned by Cordum's gateway. Locked so drift surfaces as a conformance-suite failure, not a silent per-SDK parsing bug.

code.description: Machine-readable error code. snake_case, stable across versions. SDKs map this to typed error classes via a shared table documented in docs/wildcards.md.

message.description: Operator-facing message. Never used for programmatic branching — code is the SSOT.

details.description:
Structured per-error context. Well-known sub-shapes:
- field_errors: [{field, code, message}] for ValidationError
- resource: string for NotFoundError / ConflictError
- retry_after_seconds: integer for RateLimitError
- trace_id: string (always present when the server-side chain is enabled)
